violations.text: The three door low boy was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS food item cookie dough was voluntarily disposed of cookie dough was observed at 49 Degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
Ceiling tiles in the sales area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2024
